message:
fix(pty): implement PTY resize by retaining master FD after spawn

PtyProcess::resize() was stubbed out and pair.master was dropped after
spawn(), so child processes always saw the initial dimensions via
TIOCGWINSZ. Retain the master handle in a struct field and delegate
resize() to portable-pty's MasterPty::resize(), which issues TIOCSWINSZ
and delivers SIGWINCH to the child.

Closes #28

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
